title: Sample preparation and live-cell 3D-SIM imaging of PKmitoRed
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dan67","text":"Protocol for sample preparation and live-cell 3D-SIM imaging of PKmitoRed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wash HeLa TMEM192-3xHA control and / or NPC1, NPC2 mutants with 1xPBS
Add Trypsin to cells for 5 min and incubate at 37°C to dissociate cells from plastic well
Resuspend cells in 1 mL DMEM media
Seed appropriate number of cells into Mattek 35 mm glass bottom dishes. Top up growth media to 2-3ml volume.
Wash cells twice with 1xPBS and replace with fresh growth media.

Image cells on DeltaVision OMX v4 using an Olympus 60x / 1.42 Plan Apo oil objective (Olympus, Japan). Record 568 channels using a front-illuminated sCMOS (PCO Photonics, USA) in 512x512px image size mode, 1x binning, 125 nm z-stepping and with 15 raw images taken per z-plane (5 phase-shifts, 3 angles). For live cell imaging, use 285MHz fast mode on sCMOS. Take 1 - 1.5 µm thick z-stacks around the central in focus plane. Keep exposure times and laser power low, to avoid bleaching and damage.

Reconstruct raw images using CUDA-accelerated 3D-SIM reconstruction code (https://github.com/scopetools/cudasirecon) based on Gustafsson et al. (2008[FK1] ). The Optimal optical transfer function (OTF) was determined via an in-house build software, developed by Talley Lambert from the NIC / CBMF (GitHub: https://github.com/tlambert03/otfsearch, all channels were registered to the 528nm output channel, Wiener filter: 0.002, background: 90).

Open .dv composite image stacks in Fiji. Select mitochondria with ROI (keep same size across all measurements). Save ROI for running macro on them. Adjust B&C in Fiji and copy images to Illustrator for making figures.
Use ImageJ macro to measure crisate occupancy.
Plot the result in the tool of choice for statistical analysis.
Aspirate DMEM, was twice with 1xPBS and add Galactose-media to the cells. Culture for desired times (for example 24h or 72h)
Take cells to the microscope. Keep at 37°C until instrument is ready.
Aspirate growth media and incubate cells with PKmitoRed (1:1000) in growth medium.
creator: Felix Kraus
